title: Add To-Do List feature and Admin Dashboard with credential-based access control

requirements.text: Add a To-Do List feature to the backend: define a ToDo data type with fields for id, title, description, completed (bool), createdAt (timestamp), and optionally owner principal. Implement CRUD operations: createTodo, getTodos, updateTodo (toggle complete / edit title), deleteTodo stored in a stable map.

quotes: add to do list in it and then upgrade it

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes createTodo, getTodos, updateTodo, and deleteTodo functions
ToDo items persist across canister upgrades via stable storage
Each todo has id, title, description, completed, and createdAt fields

requirements.text: Add a To-Do List page in the frontend at route /todos. The page should display all todos fetched via React Query, allow creating new todos (title + optional description), marking todos complete/incomplete, editing todo titles, and deleting todos. Show completed and pending todos in separate sections.

quotes: add to do list in it and then upgrade it

acceptanceCriteria: Route /todos is accessible from the navigation header
User can create a new todo with title and optional description
User can toggle a todo between complete and incomplete
User can delete a todo with a confirmation step
Pending and completed todos are displayed in separate sections
All mutations use React Query and show toast feedback

requirements.text: Add a navigation link to the To-Do List page (/todos) in the Header component alongside existing nav links.

quotes: add to do list in it

acceptanceCriteria: Header displays a 'To-Do' or 'Tasks' nav link
Link navigates to /todos

requirements.text: Create a dedicated Admin Dashboard page at route /admin-dashboard (separate from the existing AdminDashboard.tsx if needed, or upgrade it). This page must be accessible ONLY when the user has authenticated with email aahanvarma42@gmail.com and password aahan123. Implement a simple credential check gate: show a login form (email + password fields) before rendering the dashboard content. Store the authenticated session in React state or sessionStorage so the gate only needs to be passed once per session.

quotes: add admin dashboar to monitor and only accessable with email:aahanvarma42@gmail.com and pass:aahan123

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin-dashboard shows a login form if not yet authenticated
Only credentials email=aahanvarma42@gmail.com and password=aahan123 grant access
Incorrect credentials show an error message
After successful login the admin dashboard content is shown without re-prompting in the same session
The admin dashboard displays system-wide monitoring data: device statuses, user counts, recent access events, and todo statistics

requirements.text: Upgrade the Admin Dashboard page content to include a To-Do monitoring panel showing total todos, completed count, pending count, and a list of recent todos across all users.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard shows a stat card with total, completed, and pending todo counts
Admin dashboard shows a list of recent todos
Todo data is fetched via React Query

requirements.text: Add an /admin-dashboard route to the TanStack Router configuration in App.tsx pointing to the new Admin Dashboard page component.
acceptanceCriteria: Route /admin-dashboard is registered in the router
The route renders the credential-gated Admin Dashboard page

requirements.text: Generate a migration.mo file to safely upgrade the existing backend stable state to include the new stable todos map without losing existing device, user, event, and rule data.
acceptanceCriteria: migration.mo preserves all existing stable maps (devices, users, events, rules)
New stable todos map is initialized empty on first upgrade
Canister upgrade completes without data loss

constraints: Admin Dashboard credential check must use exactly email: aahanvarma42@gmail.com and password: aahan123
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor
Existing device, user, event, and rule backend functionality must not be broken
nonGoals: Replacing Internet Identity authentication with the admin email/password system — the credential gate is only for the Admin Dashboard page
Multi-user todo ownership or per-user isolation beyond what is naturally provided by principal
Real-time todo sync or WebSocket-based updates
Email notifications or external integrations for todo reminders
